text.tspan: Property: readers and writers NEVER BLOCK EACH OTHER.
This is the killer feature of MVCC.
Long-running analytical queries don't lock OLTP writes.
Writes don't wait for readers to release locks.

g.text: Writer writes (NEW version, doesn't touch old)
Reader reads AGAIN u2014 STILL sees t0 snapshot (no W effect)
UPDATE accounts SET balance=50 WHERE id=1

text.tspan: (W hasn't committed, and even after it does,
R's snapshot is fixed at t0)

g.text: COMMIT u2192 txn_max of v_old finalized, v_new visible from t1
